description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a broad, low-pitched hip roof in a dark brown color. The structure features a combination of light-colored exterior walls and stone or brick accents, particularly around the porch and entryway. A covered front porch with wooden posts and a paved driveway leading to an attached garage are prominent on the front facade. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of single and grouped panes, and the house sits on a rectangular plot with a green lawn. The roof includes a visible chimney and several small roof vents. The overall design is modern yet retains classic bungalow proportions, emphasizing horizontal lines and a welcoming entry.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide hip roof, light walls, stone accents, a covered porch, and an attached garage, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, attached garage, and paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage door, side windows, and the extension of the paved driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional porch area, and more windows along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the rear windows, chimney, and the continuous green lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows
